message:
test(sqlmodel): add generic model compile-time verification tests

Adds compile-time tests verifying that the Model derive macro correctly
handles generic type parameters. Documents the three supported patterns
for generic models:

Pattern 1: Generic with skipped field (PhantomData marker)
- Generic type not stored in database
- Use #[sqlmodel(skip)] on PhantomData field
- Example: TaggedModel<T> with _marker: PhantomData<T>

Pattern 2: Concrete fields with generic metadata
- Database fields are concrete types
- Generic provides compile-time type safety
- Example: TypedResponse<T> with _type: PhantomData<T>

Documents IMPORTANT CONSTRAINTS for generic models:
- Type must satisfy Send + Sync (Model trait bounds)
- Type must support Into<Value>/From<Value> for DB operations

Tests verify:
- test_generic_model_with_phantom_data: Basic instantiation
- test_generic_model_fields: Field metadata correctness (skip respected)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
